name: IT Technology Themes and Trends
description: A collection of Aberdeen Group research themes and trends for 2003-2004 authored by Peter S. Kastner, covering twelve strategic IT topics including IT deflation and per-processor software licensing, tiered storage and information lifecycle management, consumer empowerment via Internet, the extinction of best-of-breed IT, Sarbanes-Oxley compliance costs, and real-time consumer tracking. Each theme is framed as an Aberdeen research offering with a pithy headline and analytical summary. The document serves as both a market intelligence snapshot and a business development vehicle for Aberdeen consulting engagements.
